Method.Name: main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement2019
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement2019() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.plan_id AS %1, r.query_id AS %2, r.plan_group_id AS %3, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.engine_version) AS %4, r.compatibility_level AS %5, r.query_plan_hash AS %6, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.query_plan) AS %7, r.is_online_index_plan AS %8, r.is_trivial_plan AS %9, r.is_parallel_plan AS %10, r.is_forced_plan AS %11, r.is_natively_compiled AS %12, r.force_failure_count AS %13, r.last_force_failure_reason AS %14, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.last_force_failure_reason_desc) AS %15, r.count_compiles AS %16, r.initial_compile_start_time AS %17, r.last_compile_start_time AS %18, r.last_execution_time AS %19, r.avg_compile_duration AS %20, r.last_compile_duration AS %21, r.plan_forcing_type AS %22, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.plan_forcing_type_desc) AS %23, 0 AS %24, 0 AS %25, 0 AS %26, '' AS %27, 1010 AS %28 FROM sys.query_store_plan r", asPlanId, asQueryId, asPlanGroupId, asEngineVersion, asCompatibilityLevel, asQueryPlanHash, asQueryPlan, asIsOnlineIndexPlan, asIsTrivialPlan, asIsParallelPlan, asIsForcedPlan, asIsNativelyCompiled, asForceFailureCount, asLastForceFailureReason, asLastForceFailureReasonDesc, asCountCompiles, asInitialCompileStartTime, asLastCompileStartTime, asLastExecutionTime, asAvgCompileDuration, asLastCompileDuration, asPlanForcingType, asPlanForcingTypeDesc, asHasCompileReplayScript, asIsOptimizedPlanForcingDisabled, asPlanType, asPlanTypeDesc, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: createSQLStatement2022
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement2022() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.plan_id AS %1, r.query_id AS %2, r.plan_group_id AS %3, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.engine_version) AS %4, r.compatibility_level AS %5, r.query_plan_hash AS %6, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.query_plan) AS %7, r.is_online_index_plan AS %8, r.is_trivial_plan AS %9, r.is_parallel_plan AS %10, r.is_forced_plan AS %11, r.is_natively_compiled AS %12, r.force_failure_count AS %13, r.last_force_failure_reason AS %14, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.last_force_failure_reason_desc) AS %15, r.count_compiles AS %16, r.initial_compile_start_time AS %17, r.last_compile_start_time AS %18, r.last_execution_time AS %19, r.avg_compile_duration AS %20, r.last_compile_duration AS %21, r.plan_forcing_type AS %22, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.plan_forcing_type_desc) AS %23, r.has_compile_replay_script AS %24, r.is_optimized_plan_forcing_disabled AS %25, r.plan_type AS %26, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.plan_type_desc) AS %27, 1010 AS %28 FROM sys.query_store_plan r", asPlanId, asQueryId, asPlanGroupId, asEngineVersion, asCompatibilityLevel, asQueryPlanHash, asQueryPlan, asIsOnlineIndexPlan, asIsTrivialPlan, asIsParallelPlan, asIsForcedPlan, asIsNativelyCompiled, asForceFailureCount, asLastForceFailureReason, asLastForceFailureReasonDesc, asCountCompiles, asInitialCompileStartTime, asLastCompileStartTime, asLastExecutionTime, asAvgCompileDuration, asLastCompileDuration, asPlanForcingType, asPlanForcingTypeDesc, asHasCompileReplayScript, asIsOptimizedPlanForcingDisabled, asPlanType, asPlanTypeDesc, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: createSQLStatement
initialize
construct
